== Notes for [[Item:Q106012|Q106012]] ==

* Wilaadat (Birth):
* Wafaat (Death):

Source:

ID: I180890

Name: Zahra' (Zohra) bint Husayn al-Hassan 1

Sex: F

Name: Zahra' (Zohra) bint HUSAYN 1

Birth: ABT 690 1

Event: Relationship (J,M&L) 42nd Great-grandparent 1

Marriage 1 Abed Abu Farisi al-Hirah b: ABT 688

Children

Na'im al-Lakhmi b: ABT 710

Sources:

Title: loren.ged

Repository:

Media: Other

Text: Date of Import: Apr 12, 2006

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
geni:6000000004533831121

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
